---
title: "CDADE Results Report"
author: "CDADE Team"
date: "2026-07-05"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

# Results

## Metrics summary

The results table will be populated from results/stats/summary.csv.

## Statistical comparison

A placeholder critical-difference diagram will be generated from results/stats/cliffs_delta.json.

```python
import json
from pathlib import Path
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

with open("results/stats/cliffs_delta.json") as f:
    cliffs = json.load(f)

fig, ax = plt.subplots()
ax.text(0.5, 0.5, "Critical-difference diagram placeholder", ha="center")
ax.set_axis_off()
plt.show()
```
